title: EccKey::flush private method signals intended reuse that never happened
description: wolftpm/src/key.rs:116: EccKey::flush is a private fn called only from Drop::drop. A private method that exists in exactly one call site is noise — it has the shape of 'might be reused someday' without being public or documented. Suggested rewrite: inline the three unsafe lines directly into Drop::drop with the existing SAFETY comment. If explicit flush-before-drop semantics are wanted in the future (e.g., to inspect the error from wolfTPM2_UnloadHandle), that's the moment to make it pub with a return value, not now.
